item.title: Southern Cross Media Group announces leadership changes after Seven West merger
item.description: A global search is now underway to find a replacement CEO.

item.title: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese joins calls for Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor to be cut from royal line of succession
item.description: ‘These are grave allegations and Australians take them seriously.’

item.title: Bulldogs star admits they had their ‘worst’ training session before jetting off to Las Vegas
item.description: ‘We sort of lost focus a bit.’

item.title: Private health insurance: Millions of Aussies sabotaging own savings as premiums jump by up to 5.98 per cent
item.description: A staggering number of customers are settling for a deal they don’t think is great value.

item.title: 7NEWS Melbourne reporter Melina Sarris swaps Europe for Adelaide to attend Fringe Festival with family
item.description: ‘You can travel overseas with young children, but I really don’t want to.’

item.title: Backpackers left homeless after busy WA-hostels Dolphin Retreat and Wander Inn shut over asbestos fears
item.description: ‘Once you have it, it’s with you for life.’

item.title: Jack Doohan details ‘serious death threats’ at last F1 race before being dropped by Alpine
item.description: ‘I was there with my girlfriend and my trainer, and I’ve got three armed men around me.’

item.title: TV host Savannah Guthrie’s family offer $US1 million reward to find missing mother Nancy
item.description: ‘We also know that she may be lost. She may already be gone.’

item.title: Ash Barty ready ‘to dust off the cobwebs’ with return to competition at New Zealand Open golf tournament
item.description: The former world No.1 has been tipped to be ‘a bit of an over-achiever’ on little practice.

item.title: WiseTech’s 2000 AI job cuts set alarm bells ringing for economy
item.description: WiseTech’s plans to slash 2000 jobs from a workforce of 7000 act as a warning for a potentially massive reshaping of Australia’s economy.

item.title: Man charged over alleged purchase of child abuse material online using cryptocurrency in Mount Austin, NSW
item.description: Police seized devices allegedly containing more than 1000 files of child abuse and bestiality material.

item.title: Mother of five's death in custody at Tennant Creek Watch House in the NT triggers lawsuit
item.description: ‘Ms Dempsey deserved humane and proper care.’

item.title: Melbourne researchers develop new tool to identify children's speech disorders
item.description: The groundbreaking online tool that could save thousands of kids from unnecessary therapy waitlists.

item.title: Missing US mother found after vanishing in 2001 - but still doesn’t want family to know where she is
item.description: The discovery has rocked Michele’s three children, who had been desperately searching for her.

item.title: Alexei Popyrin loses to Jakub Mensik in Dubai to cap nightmare week for Aussie tennis stars
item.description: The 26-year-old was quickly brought down to earth after posting a rare win.

item.title: Sydney daycare operator facing fraud charges after allegedly running unregistered facility
item.description: The 33-year-old allegedly pocketed $400,000 through the operation.

item.title: Brisbane company launches hyperspeed aircraft capable of reaching London in 90 minutes
item.description: If they’re successful, a flight from Australia to London could take just 90 minutes.

item.title: ‘Insane’: King Charles dragged into Epstein saga amid Andrew police probe
item.description: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor was arrested on his 66th birthday last week.

item.title: There’s a blood moon on the rise next week, when and where to see the lunar eclipse across Australia on March 3
item.description: The stunning phenomenon will be at least partially visible everywhere in Australia on Tuesday.

item.title: Grace Tame responds to Anthony Albanese calling her ‘difficult’
item.description: The prime minister has since apologised for his comment.

item.title: AusAlert emergency message system to begin trial this year with nationwide test
item.description: The system aims to tell people what the emergency is, where it is happening, how serious it is and what they should do.

item.title: Track conditions key to Ceolwulf’s chances of upsetting Autumn Glow in Verry Elleegant
item.description: ‘I’m not even thinking about winning chances.’

item.title: Austin WTA tournament unveils ‘rage room’ for players after Australian Open privacy concerns
item.description: Immediate change has been enacted to ensure players will no longer feel like ‘animals in the zoo’.

item.title: Deadly mould outbreak at Sydney’s Royal Prince Alfred Hospital kills three patients
item.description: Explosive documents reveal a shocking cover-up attempt and widespread hygiene failures across the state's hospitals.

item.title: Viral Japanese monkey Punch‘s bond with plush toy mirrors harrowing 1950s attachment study
item.description: The heartbreaking story of the baby macaque has taken the internet by storm.

item.title: US mother’s decades-long disappearance takes dramatic turn as she’s arrested days after being found alive
item.description: Michele Hundley Smith chose not to be reconnected with her family as their 24-year search came to an end.

item.title: Flying taxis poised to swoop down for Brisbane Olympics
item.description: ‘We can’t wait to fully take off publicly, but it’s closer than you think.’

item.title: Hero tradie chases off would-be thief who tried to steal car with young child inside in Brisbane
item.description: ‘I heard her calling out. I dropped everything and ran.’

item.title: AFL facing major fixturing headache in 2027 due to Australia’s Test against England at MCG
item.description: The league is now considering a range of options, including delaying the start to the 2027 season.

item.title: Sussan Ley officially resigns from parliament after being ousted as Liberal Party leader by Angus Taylor
item.description: ‘I hope I have paved the way for the next woman to be elected.’

item.title: Aussie Olympic champion Matthew Mitcham spills on nude scenes in new stage performance in Australia
item.description: The gold medallist strips off as he takes to the stage in his first major role on Australian soil.

item.title: Harry and Meghan comfort cancer patients in Jordan
item.description: The Duke and Duchess of Sussex also spoke with recovering addicts.

item.title: Character references to be scrapped in Victorian courts for crimes including rape and assault
item.description: ‘As if being a ‘good bloke’ cancels out the violence you perpetrate.’

item.title: Federal Court in Darwin orders $54m compensation over cultural damage from McArthur River Mine
item.description: After years in court, Glencore’s mine was found to have permanently damaged sacred sites and cultural connections to Country.

item.title: Channel 7’s AFL predictions for the 2026 season: Premiers, Brownlow Medal winner, player to watch
item.description: Our expert commentators and award-winning journos are dropping bombs ahead of the AFL season.

item.title: Supporters call for review of conviction of political killing mastermind Phuong Ngo who was jailed 30 years ago
item.description: Supporters are fighting to release Phuong Ngo, arguing he’s spent decades in jail for a crime he says he never committed.

item.title: Aussie tennis star Ajla Tomljanovic loses quarter-final against Kimberly Birrell after ‘terrible scheduling situation’
item.description: ‘This shouldn’t be allowed.’

item.title: 600-million-year-old Australian fossil site tipped for World Heritage listing
item.description: A 58,000-hectare Australian expanse containing some of the world's oldest evidence of animal life could be included on the prestigious list.

item.title: Legendary Australian racehorse Makybe Diva dies aged 26
item.description: The three-time Melbourne Cup winner is being farewelled after a short battle.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Telcos switching off tens of thousands of phones due to Triple-0 crisis. What to do if you’re affected
item.description: Here’s what you can do if you’re affected.

item.title: Australia reacts to US, Israel attack on Iran as world watches conflict unfold
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese supports the US in preventing Iran ‘continuing to threaten international peace and security’.

item.title: Formula One bosses ‘closely monitoring’ Middle East situation ahead of Australian Grand Prix
item.description: The escalating conflict could have major implications on the season, which begins in Australia next week.

item.title: Former AFL player Jayden Hunt playing golf every day in bid to achieve PGA Tour dream
item.description: ‘I’m actually more sore now than I have been ever in my footy career, which is crazy.’

item.title: Crowds celebrate across Iran after Supreme Leader Khamenei killed in US-Israeli strikes
item.description: ‘I’m dreaming, hello new world,’ shouts one man amid the celebrations.

item.title: Why Israel and the US have launched an attack on Iran
item.description: More than 200 people including Iran’s supreme leader have been confirmed dead in the first volley of bombings.

item.title: Children among hundreds killed as US-Israeli attacks strike two schools in Iran
item.description: Some of the first confirmed deaths in the attack came from a girls school in south Iran.

item.title: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese urge Australians to flee from Iran amid devastating attacks
item.description: ‘Leave Iran as soon as possible, of course, if it is safe to do so.’

item.title: Townsville Fire win WNBL title in dramatic OT stunner away from home against Perth Lynx
item.description: Inspirational skipper Courtney Woods starred despite needing glue surgery after a blow to the head.

item.title: Sam Kerr steps up to score match-winner in Matildas’ Asian Cup opener against the Philippines
item.description: The superstar captain has launched Australia’s bid for glory on home soil in style.

item.title: Iran conflict: Saudi refinery struck as death toll passes 500
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news out of the Middle East as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Sam Kerr gets ‘monkey’ off her back with first international goal in 851 days at Asian Cup
item.description: The Matildas captain keeps getting asked the same question and the answer is not far away.

item.title: Iranian football federation president offers bleak World Cup outlook after US attack
item.description: The unintended consequences of the bombings have now reached sport.

item.title: Delta Goodrem announced as Australia’s representative for the 70th Eurovision Song Contest
item.description: ‘I am so honoured to be representing Australia on one of the biggest music stages in the world.’

item.title: Mitchell Starc’s five-word reaction to wife Alyssa Healy’s first ball in international cricket
item.description: The champion bowler threw shade at his partner after she took the ball for the first time in her career.

item.title: Kelly Osbourne responds to body shamers after her appearance at the Brit Awards with her mother Sharon
item.description: ‘I won’t sit here and allow myself to be dehumanised in such a way.’

item.title: Tom Hanks’ son Chet Hanks shares video claiming he’s stuck in Medellin
item.description: The actor was returning home to the US after meeting friends when his plans took an unexpected turn.

item.title: NSW Premier Chris Minns says 2027 election campaign will be his last
item.description: NSW Premier Chris Minns has announced that 2027’s election campaign will be his last, revealing that he won’t seek a further term beyond that.

item.title: 2026 Actor Awards: Highlights from the ceremony in Los Angeles as celebrities honoured with emotional tributes
item.description: Here is a full list of the winners.

item.title: Australian billionaire Adrian Portelli reports feeling safer surrounded by missile threats in Dubai than Melbourne
item.description: The high-profile entrepreneur said he’s more worried about food stains than missiles.

item.title: Raiders recruit Daine Laurie at centre of NRL drugs investigation stemming from alleged Mad Monday scandal
item.description: The league is locked in talks ahead of this weekend’s Round 1 matches.

item.title: Widow devastated as Bali court delays verdict for Australians accused of killing her husband
item.description: Jazmyn Gourdeas was blindsided by the last‑minute delay in the trial of those accused of killing Zivan Radmanovic.

item.title: Legendary jockey Pat Hyland dies surrounded by family: ‘Deeply loved to the end’
item.description: The champion became an icon when he achieved one of Australian racing’s most famous feats in front of Prince Charles and Princess Diana.

item.description: Australia will have a challenge to finish atop Group A after the 2022 runners-up laid down a marker on the Gold Coast.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Huge plumes of smoke over Beirut as US urges citizens to flee Middle East
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news out of the Middle East as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Aussie Test star Alex Carey welcomes the prospect of privatisation within the BBL: ‘It should happen’
item.description: ‘That just makes sense to me. If it’s good for everyone, then let’s get it going.’

item.title: Gold Coast Suns and Titans unite in unprecedented cross-code AFL-NRL partnership
item.description: An unprecedented and ‘formidable’ partnership has been forged between two clubs with the same vision.

item.title: Worst fears realised as Aston Martin set to effectively skip Australian Grand Prix
item.description: ‘It’s a snowball effect for them, and they’re in dire trouble.’

item.title: Man charged over alleged axe murder of a camper in northern NSW identified as Ahwen Kohn
item.description: A woman was also allegedly strangled during the altercation.

item.title: Red rash on Donald Trump's neck at White House prompts questions
item.description: The red mark has drawn widespread attention and the president’s doctor has now addressed it.

item.title: Kyle and Jackie O: Insiders claim the radio hosts may never reunite for their KIIS FM show following tense on-air clash
item.description: Henderson is believed to be seeking legal advice about her options.

item.title: F1 superstar Charles Leclerc and Alexandra Saint Mleux tie the knot in secret ceremony with $20m vintage Ferrari
item.description: The happy couple will do it all again in a second wedding next year.

item.title: NRL superstar Zac Lomax back in limbo as legal saga ends in shock twist
item.description: The superstar is facing a two-year exile after his proposed move to Storm was blocked.

item.title: Aussie cricket great Stuart MacGill explodes at podcast co-host: ‘You are a moron’
item.description: The former cricketer was about to ‘jump across the mic’ before the show ended abruptly.

item.title: Geelong coach Chris Scott speaks out over ‘egregious’ injustice to Tanner Bruhn
item.description: The young gun will play his first game in 17 months after being falsely accused of rape.

item.title: Jagga Smith and Harry Dean to make AFL debuts when Carlton take on Sydney in season-opener
item.description: ‘They’re both great stories.’

item.title: Shane Warne’s daughter Summer claims patron poured water over her for dancing at Ed Sheeran concert
item.description: ‘God forbid I stand up at a concert’.

item.title: Brisbane martial arts coach identified after spearfishing accident at Great Barrier Reef
item.description: A nearly three-hour search by boat and helicopter followed reports of a man overboard.

item.title: Knife-wielding man shot dead by police at private home in Tingalpa
item.description: It is the third police shooting and second fatality in a matter of hours.

item.title: ‘Evil Dead’ star Bruce Campbell shares ‘shock’ health update as he’s forced to cancel upcoming appearances
item.description: ‘I’m posting this, because professionally, a few things will have to change.’

item.title: Matildas star Amy Sayer praises ‘brave’ Iranians as courageous anthem act at Asian Cup goes viral
item.description: The women’s team made a defiant stand amid increasing political instability in their homeland.

item.title: Porsche's largest SUV yet to offer petrol, PHEV, electric options – report
item.description: Porsche's new flagship has gone from being an electric SUV on a new platform to an Audi Q9 cousin with V6, V8 and plug-in hybrid power.

item.title: Tasmanian uni student Mia Goody sent taxi instead of ambulance during seizure
item.description: ‘She was slumped over, mouth open, shaking quite violently. It was terrifying.’

item.title: Aussie workers cash in as new Seek data reveals the top 15 jobs with the fastest growing average salaries
item.description: The role with the biggest salary boost earned an extra $30,000 a year on average.

item.title: Mike Smithson: Inside the escalating fight for SA’s undecided voters ahead of election
item.description: There is only 18 days left to campaign for the 2026 SA election as regional seats take a key focus.

item.title: Polestar 7: All-new baby EV SUV confirmed for Australia
item.description: Polestar's local boss has confirmed the brand's smallest and most affordable model yet is headed Down Under in 2028.

item.title: Major emergency response underway as industrial fire breaks out in North Geelong
item.description: Multiple fire crews are battling the fire at a car wreckage yard in Victoria.

item.title: Charlie Curnow to get SCG rocking in Sydney-Carlton blockbuster: ‘They’ve shown their dislike for him’
item.description: ‘If you can put a bigger shot on your mate, you try and do it.’

item.title: Some flights from United Arab Emirates as governments seek to extract citizens amid Middle East conflict
item.description: Thousands of travellers have been left stranded after sweeping airspace closures due to air strikes.

item.title: Ute tax breaks cost taxpayers "significantly more" than EV incentives, says Polestar
item.description: The local boss of Polestar argues federal tax breaks for commercial vehicles cost the taxpayer "significantly more money" than EV incentives.

item.title: Killer Morten Birkegaard Jensen thought stabbing nurse Erin Mullavey would 'save the world'
item.description: The nurse was stabbed in her head, neck and body by the schizophrenic man who believed she was ‘destined for death’.

item.title: Cricket star Travis Head tears to shreds public narrative on Australia’s failed T20 World Cup campaign
item.description: Experts and fans were all saying the same thing, but Travis Head has called it nonsense.

item.title: NRL superstar Reece Walsh reveals he’s ‘too nervous’ to watch replays of finals
item.description: ‘I don’t have the courage.’

item.title: Jackie O’s KIIS FM contract terminated after feud with co-host Kyle Sandilands
item.description: Kyle Sandilands has been suspended for 14 days as his on-air behaviour comes under scrutiny.

item.title: US track star Sha’Carri Richardson to make blockbuster appearance in Stawell Gift
item.description: ‘We are in for something that we’ll never forget.’

item.title: Israel-Iran war: Drivers queue across Australia amid petrol price fears but true bowser pain could be 10 days away
item.description: The Middle East conflict has caused drivers to rush to fuel stations to fill up.

item.title: Geelong captain Patrick Dangerfield in doubt for opener against Gold Coast
item.description: Coach Chris Scott is dealing with another headache ahead of his team’s first game.

item.title: NSW Health confirms measles case in western Sydney with no known source
item.description: Residents are being urged to be on alert after an infectious person moved through multiple locations.

item.title: Hawthorn’s Jai Newcombe free to play opening game after AFL tribunal downgrades one-match ban
item.description: ‘There is no injury and absolutely no expression of pain.’

item.title: Father-of-two Sandy Sandhu dies after hit by alleged drunk driver while jump staring car on Adelaide motorway
item.description: ‘I lost my husband. My kids lost their father.’

item.title: Gold Coast girl Chloe Jeffries, 8, killed after snowmobile flips on family trip near Hakuba Village in Japan
item.description: ‘Chloe will always be remembered for her bright spirit.’

item.title: Israel-Iran war: Middle East conflict threatens Australian interest rates and grocery prices
item.description: Experts warn Australians could face a perfect storm of rising costs and potential interest rate hikes.

item.title: Israel-Iran war: Why cruise ships can’t simply head into calmer waters in Middle East conflict zones
item.description: Chaos in the Gulf has left cruise passengers locked in a ‘golden cage’.

item.title: Israel Defence Force’s message to Australia amid escalating Middle East conflict
item.description: ‘It could be an Australian problem tomorrow.’

item.title: NSW Premier Chris Minns promises transparency after two kids die with mould infections at the Children’s Hospital, Westmead
item.description: ‘It’s obviously terrible and our condolences are with those families.’

item.title: F1-inspired Mercedes-AMG GT63 special priced for Australia – but it’s already sold out
item.description: The special edition Mercedes-AMG has been locked in for Australia, but the automaker is tight-lipped on how many are coming here – and says they’re all sold anyway.

item.title: 2026 Mercedes-AMG GT63 Pro review: Quick drive
item.description: The Pro version of AMG’s GT63 is the fastest, most potent GT in Mercedes-Benz showrooms and it's made for the track – where we’ve driven it in anger.
